question_canonical: Show the segment-to-offering path for Vision Grid Edge.
gold_cypher: MATCH p=(s:BusinessSegment)-[:OFFERS]->(root:Offering)-[:OFFERS*0..]->(o:Offering {name: $offering}) WITH s.name AS segment, nodes(p)[1..] AS offerings UNWIND range(0, size(offerings) - 1) AS depth RETURN segment, offerings[depth].name AS offering, depth ORDER BY depth

question_canonical: Show the segment-to-offering path for Guard Mobile.
gold_cypher: MATCH p=(s:BusinessSegment)-[:OFFERS]->(root:Offering)-[:OFFERS*0..]->(o:Offering {name: $offering}) WITH s.name AS segment, nodes(p)[1..] AS offerings UNWIND range(0, size(offerings) - 1) AS depth RETURN segment, offerings[depth].name AS offering, depth ORDER BY depth

question_canonical: What parent offering anchors Vision Grid Edge?
gold_cypher: MATCH p=(root:Offering)-[:OFFERS*1..]->(o:Offering {name: $offering}) WITH root, length(p) AS depth ORDER BY depth DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN root.name AS root_offering

question_canonical: What parent offering anchors Guard Mobile?
gold_cypher: MATCH p=(root:Offering)-[:OFFERS*1..]->(o:Offering {name: $offering}) WITH root, length(p) AS depth ORDER BY depth DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN root.name AS root_offering

gold_cypher: MATCH (s:BusinessSegment)-[:OFFERS*1..]->(o:Offering {name: $offering}) RETURN DISTINCT s.name AS segment

question_canonical: Which offerings are above Vision Grid Edge?

question_canonical: Which offerings are above Guard Mobile?

question_canonical: What parent offering is Guard Mobile under?
gold_cypher: MATCH (:Offering {name: $offering})<-[:OFFERS]-(parent:Offering) RETURN DISTINCT parent.name AS parent_offering

question_canonical: What is the root offering for Vision Grid Edge?
gold_cypher: MATCH p=(root:Offering)-[:OFFERS*1..]->(o:Offering {name: $offering}) WITH root.name AS root_offering, length(p) AS depth ORDER BY depth DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN root_offering

question_canonical: What is the root offering for Guard Mobile?
gold_cypher: MATCH p=(root:Offering)-[:OFFERS*1..]->(o:Offering {name: $offering}) WITH root.name AS root_offering, length(p) AS depth ORDER BY depth DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN root_offering
